docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $973.11 FILED BY VALERIO MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT BUCKY MICHAEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-08-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
